what: Data on the New York City Housing Authority
title: Data on the New York City Housing Authority
text: Spatial tabular data New York City Housing Authority (NYCHA), including public housing development boundaries, residential addresses, NYCHA Development Data Book, housing maintenance code violations NYCHA properties, community facilities, service centers, aggregate resident statistics.

what: Example: total apartments and population by borough
title: Data on the New York City Housing Authority
code: nyc_development_data_df |>   summarise(     developments = n(),     apartments = sum(total_number_of_apartments, na.rm = TRUE),     population = sum(total_population, na.rm = TRUE),     .by = borough   ) |>   arrange(desc(apartments)) #> # A tibble: 7 × 4 #>   borough         developments apartments population #>   <chr>                  <int>      <dbl>      <dbl> #> 1 Brooklyn                 104      61731     122830 #> 2 Manhattan                105      55519     104053 #> 3 Bronx                     95      44489      90991 #> 4 Queens                    27      16802      33167 #> 5 Staten Island             10       4510       8633 #> 6 Brooklyn/Queens            2         59         73 #> 7 Bronx/Queens               3         31         47

title: Data on the New York City Housing Authority
code: ggplot(nyc_developments_sf) +   geom_sf(aes(fill = borough), colour = NA) +   scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +   labs(     title = "NYCHA public housing developments",     fill = NULL   ) +   theme_minimal()

title: NYCHA residential addresses — nyc_addresses_df
text: residential addresses associated NYCHA developments, including building, stairhall, tax-lot identifiers, plus geographic administrative boundary information.

title: NYCHA residential addresses — nyc_addresses_df
NYCHA residential addresses — nyc_addresses_df
text: tibble 2,955 rows 26 columns: development Development name. tds_num Tenant Data System (TDS) development number. building_num Building number within development. stairhall_num Stairhall number within building. borough New York City borough (title case). house_num Street number portion address. street Street name. address Full street address. city Postal city (typically Bronx, Brooklyn, New York, etc.). state State (NY). zip_code ZIP code. bin Building Identification Number (BIN), Department City Planning. block Tax block. lot Tax lot. bbl Borough-block-lot identifier (10-digit concatenation). census_tract_2020 2020 Census tract. nta_code 2020 Neighborhood Tabulation Area code. nta_name 2020 Neighborhood Tabulation Area name. community_district Community District. city_council_district New York City Council district. state_assembly_district New York State Assembly district. state_senate_district New York State Senate district. us_congressional_district U.S. Congressional district. privately_managed Logical: whether property privately managed Rental Assistance Demonstration (RAD/PACT). latitude Latitude (WGS 84). longitude Longitude (WGS 84).

title: NYCHA residential addresses — nyc_addresses_df
text: NYC OpenData: https://data.cityofnewyork.us/Housing-Development/NYCHA-Residential-Addresses/k6ya-3sk4

title: NYCHA residential addresses — nyc_addresses_df
text: Kieran Healy

title: NYCHA residential addresses (spatial) — nyc_addresses_sf
text: Point geometries NYCHA residential addresses nyc_addresses_df. Rows missing latitude longitude dropped. Coordinates reprojected EPSG:2263, NAD83 / New York Long Island (ftUS).

title: NYCHA residential addresses (spatial) — nyc_addresses_sf
NYCHA residential addresses (spatial) — nyc_addresses_sf
text: simple feature collection one row per geocoded address columns nyc_addresses_df except latitude longitude, replaced geometry column. geometry Point geometry EPSG:2263.

what: Directory of NYCHA community facilities — nyc_community_facilities_df
title: Directory of NYCHA community facilities — nyc_community_facilities_df
text: Directory community facilities (child care, senior centers, health centers, community centers, etc.) located sponsored NYCHA properties.

title: Directory of NYCHA community facilities — nyc_community_facilities_df
Directory of NYCHA community facilities — nyc_community_facilities_df
text: tibble 441 rows 16 columns: funding_agency Agency providing funding facility. borough New York City borough (title case). program_type Type program (e.g., “Senior Center”, “Day Care”). status Facility status (e.g., “Active”). development Associated NYCHA development. address Street address. sponsor Sponsoring organization. postcode ZIP code. latitude Latitude (WGS 84). longitude Longitude (WGS 84). community_board Community Board. council_district New York City Council district. census_tract Census tract. bin Building Identification Number (BIN). bbl Borough-block-lot identifier. nta Neighborhood Tabulation Area.

title: NYCHA Development Data Book — nyc_development_data_df
text: Per-development statistics NYCHA Development Data Book, including counts apartments, rooms, population, buildings, stairhalls stories; site area; building coverage; development cost; rents; administrative-district assignments.

title: NYCHA Development Data Book — nyc_development_data_df
NYCHA Development Data Book — nyc_development_data_df
text: tibble 346 rows 52 columns: data_as_of Snapshot date (Date). development Development name. hud_amp_number HUD Asset Management Project (AMP) number. tds_number Tenant Data System (TDS) development number. consolidated_tds_number Consolidated TDS number. development_edp_number Development EDP number. operating_edp_number Operating EDP number. hud_number HUD project number. program Funding program (e.g., Federal, State, Mixed). method Method (e.g., Conventional). type Building type (e.g., Senior, Family). number_of_section_8_transition_apartments Apartments Section 8 transition. number_of_current_apartments Number current apartments. total_number_of_apartments Total apartments. number_of_rental_rooms Number rental rooms. avg_no_r_r_per_apartment Average rental rooms per apartment. population_section_8_transition Population Section 8 transition units. population_public_housing Population public-housing units. total_population Total population. total_fixed_income_household Number fixed-income households. percent_fixed_income_households Percent fixed-income households (proportion 0-1). number_of_residential_bldgs Number residential buildings. number_of_non_residential_bldgs Number non-residential buildings. number_of_stairhalls Number stairhalls. number_of_stories Number stories. Character, developments report range (e.g., “15-21”). total_area_sq_ft Total site area (square feet). acres Total site area (acres). net_dev_area_sq_ft Net development area (square feet). excluding_park_acres Area excluding park acres. bldg_coverage_sq_ft Building footprint coverage (square feet). cubage_cu_ft Building cubage (cubic feet). bldg_coverage_percent Building coverage share site (proportion 0-1). density Density (units per acre similar; consult source). development_cost Original development cost, USD. per_rental_room Cost per rental room, USD. avg_monthly_gross_rent Average monthly gross rent, USD. location_street_a Street boundary . location_street_b Street boundary B. location_street_c Street boundary C. location_street_d Street boundary D. borough New York City borough (title case). community_district Community District. us_congressional_district U.S. Congressional district. ny_state_senate_district New York State Senate district. ny_state_assembly_district New York State Assembly district. ny_city_council_district New York City Council district. completion_date Date construction completed (Date). federalized_development Logical: federalized development. senior_development Logical: senior-development. electricity_paid_by_residents Logical: residents pay electricity directly. private_management Logical: privately managed RAD/PACT. rad_transferred_date Date transferred Rental Assistance Demonstration (RAD/PACT), applicable (Date).

what: NYCHA facilities and service centers — nyc_facilities_df
title: NYCHA facilities and service centers — nyc_facilities_df
text: Occupied vacant facilities NYCHA's portfolio drawn Facility Planning (commercial spaces) Community Operations (community centers, senior centers, day care centers, health centers, etc.), including five Community Operations borough offices.

title: NYCHA facilities and service centers — nyc_facilities_df
NYCHA facilities and service centers — nyc_facilities_df
text: tibble 536 rows 15 columns: borough New York City borough (title case). development_name Associated NYCHA development. address Street address. status Facility status (e.g., “Occupied”, “Vacant”). sponsor Sponsoring organization. postcode ZIP code. type Facility type (e.g., community center, senior center, day care, health center, commercial space). latitude Latitude (WGS 84). longitude Longitude (WGS 84). community_board Community Board. community_council Community Council district. census_tract Census tract. bin Building Identification Number (BIN). bbl Borough-block-lot identifier. nta Neighborhood Tabulation Area.

title: NYCHA facilities and service centers — nyc_facilities_df

what: NYCHA Resident Data Book summary — nyc_resident_summary_df
title: NYCHA Resident Data Book summary — nyc_resident_summary_df
text: Aggregate population, family, income welfare statistics NYCHA residents, broken program State/City vs. Section 8.

title: NYCHA Resident Data Book summary — nyc_resident_summary_df
NYCHA Resident Data Book summary — nyc_resident_summary_df
text: tibble 26 rows 43 columns. Percentage columns stored proportions (0-1). Money columns USD. program Program (e.g., Federal, State/City, Section 8). statecity_section8_flag State/City vs. Section 8 indicator. total_families Total number families. total_female_headed_families Female-headed families. total_male_headed_families Male-headed families. total_population Total population. average_family_size Average family size. total_minors_under_18 Minors 18. average_minors_per_family Average minors per family. total_minors_as_percent_of_population Share population 18 (proportion 0-1). all_average_total_gross_income Average total gross income, USD. all_average_gross_rent Average gross rent, USD. total_hoh_62_years_and_over Heads household aged 62+. total_hoh_62_years_and_over_as_percent_of_families Share families head household 62+ (proportion 0-1). total_female_headed_hoh_62_years_and_over Female heads household 62+. total_male_headed_hoh_62_years_and_over Male heads household 62+. total_elderly_single_person_families Elderly single-person families. total_elderly_population Total elderly population. total_62_years_and_over_as_percent_of_population Share population aged 62+ (proportion 0-1). total_families_on_welfare Families welfare. total_families_on_welfare_and_hoh_elderly Families welfare elderly head household. total_families_on_full_welfare Families full welfare. total_families_on_welfare_as_percent_of_families Share families welfare (proportion 0-1). total_single_parent_grandparent_families_with_minors Single parent/grandparent families minor children. total_female_headed_single_parent_grandparent_with_minors Female-headed single parent/grandparent families minors. total_male_headed_single_parent_grandparent_with_minors Male-headed single parent/grandparent families minors. total_single_parent_grandparent_families_on_welfare Single parent/grandparent families welfare. total_single_parent_grandparent_with_minors_as_percent_of_families Share families single parent/grandparent minors (proportion 0-1). total_families_1_or_more_employed Families 1+ employed adults. total_families_1_or_more_employed_as_percent_of_families Share families 1+ employed (proportion 0-1). total_families_2nd_adult_employed Families 2nd adult employed. all_families_average_years_in_public_housing Average years public housing. residents_under_4 Residents age 4. residents_4_to_5 Residents aged 4-5. residents_6_to_9 Residents aged 6-9. residents_10_to_13 Residents aged 10-13. residents_14_to_17 Residents aged 14-17. residents_18_to_20 Residents aged 18-20. residents_21_to_49 Residents aged 21-49. residents_50_to_61 Residents aged 50-61. residents_62_plus Residents aged 62+. total_fixed_income_families Families fixed income. total_fixed_income_families_as_percent_of_families Share families fixed income (proportion 0-1).

Housing maintenance code violations on NYCHA properties — nyc_violations_df
text: tibble 3,475 rows 35 columns: violation_id HPD violation ID. primary_bin Primary Building Identification Number (BIN). primary_boro_id Primary borough numeric identifier. primary_borough_name Primary borough name (title case). primary_house_number Primary house number violation record. primary_low_house_number Low end house-number range, . primary_high_house_number High end house-number range, . primary_street_name Primary street name. primary_postcode Primary ZIP code. development_name NYCHA development name. tds_number Tenant Data System (TDS) development number. stairhall_number Stairhall number. nycha_address_section_boro_id NYCHA address-section borough ID. nycha_address_section_borough NYCHA address-section borough name. nycha_address_section_house_number NYCHA address-section house number. nycha_address_section_street_name NYCHA address-section street name. nycha_address_section_post_code NYCHA address-section ZIP code. apartment Apartment identifier within building. story Story (floor) violation. block Tax block. lot Tax lot. violation_description Free-text description violation. class Violation class: (non-hazardous), B (hazardous), C (immediately hazardous). inspection_date Date inspection (Date). approved_date Date violation approved (Date). order_number Order number prefix indicating section Housing Maintenance Code violation pertains . issued_in_error Logical: whether violation later determined issued error. latitude Latitude (WGS 84). longitude Longitude (WGS 84). community_board Community Board. council_district New York City Council district. bin Building Identification Number (BIN). bbl Borough-block-lot identifier. census_tract_2020 2020 Census tract. nta_2020 2020 Neighborhood Tabulation Area.
